case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $100.00 U.S. CURR et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PETITION FOR FORIFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND PETITIONER'S JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S 1ST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGTORIES
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $311.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT MARQUETTA WILLINGAM. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,245.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Petitioner's Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
